item.title: A message from Ms. Burnie, Mr. Warner, Mr. Brookes:
item.description: The final tryout for the grade 7 - 8 girls basketball team is tomorrow from 2:25 pm to 4:00 pm. If you missed yesterday's tryout you must attend tomorrow to be eligible for the team.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a mandatory Drama Club Meeting tomorrow at 10:35 in Rm.209.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: This morning is the last opportunity for high school students to register to attend "Elevate and Empower: Diversity Across the Diaspora". Please use the QR code on posters in your classrooms to sign up. Registration closes at the end of lunch.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: There is a CrossFit Team practice today afterschool. Please message Mrs. Longval on Teams if you are unable to attend.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron.
item.description: There will be a unity club meeting today in room 126 all students must attend. Could all Europe trip students please return their 50/50 ticket sales and stubs INCLUDING UNSOLD TICKETS to Mme Perron by tomorrow as we will be selling the remainder at a community event later this week. Thank you

item.title: A message from Mme Perron.
item.description: Any staff members wishing to purchase a charcuterie board from the Europe Team please see Mme Perron for more information all board orders are due by March 6th and can be picked up on Holy Thursday, April 2nd here at the school in the afternoon.
